name: Margherita Classico
description: Classic sourdough crust topped with San Marzano tomatoes, buffalo mozzarella, and fresh basil.

name: Wagyu Signature Burger
description: Premium wagyu beef patty with caramelized onions, sharp cheddar, and signature truffle aioli.

name: Pepperoni Inferno
description: Zesty pepperoni and jalapeño mix on a thin, crispy crust with a drizzle of spicy honey.

name: Tuscan Beef Tagliatelle
description: Handmade tagliatelle tossed in a rich, 8-hour slow-cooked beef and pancetta ragú.

name: Rosemary Sea Salt Fries
description: Triple-cooked golden fries seasoned with sea salt and fresh aromatic rosemary sprigs.

name: Quattro Formaggi
description: A decadent four-cheese blend of mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and fontina.

name: Crispy Buttermilk Chicken
description: Crispy buttermilk chicken breast with spicy slaw and pickles in a toasted brioche bun.

name: The Beast Double Pattie
description: A towering feast featuring two flame-grilled patties, double cheese, and smoky bacon.
